description: tone follows the aging bucket exactly
assertions: 1 to 30 days past due drafts gentle; 31 to 60 firm; 61 plus final (edges at 30/31 and 60/61)
every figure and date restates the ar_scan row verbatim
sent is false and human_review_required is true
no em dashes; ranges written with to

description: penalty language only when the frozen terms contain it
assertions: with a percent-per-month clause: the clause is quoted and the accrued figure comes from the row
with no penalty clause: penalty_clause_quoted is null and the draft implies no penalty
no legal threat exceeds the contract's own remedies
the atom refuses and points at resolving the dispute first
no draft is produced for a disputed invoice

description: the draft file never enters git
assertions: saved_to is a pipeline/finance/dunning-<id>.local.md path (gitignored by the allowlist-invert rules)
the exposure note states the draft holds real amounts and stays local
the consequential gate restates amount, counterparty, and tone before the human sends
